title: Nojiko Reveals Nami’s Past
scene: On pages 12–15, Nojiko’s account of the past reveals how Nami, Bellemere, and Cocoyasi Village were damaged by Arlong’s arrival. Bellemere chooses to acknowledge Nami and Nojiko as her daughters, even when it costs her life.

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: I, for one, will not abandon Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I wouldn't be able to live with myself,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If I ABAN- DONED A HELPLESS child just to save myself!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well if you're going to fight,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The rest of us are going to get blamed anyways!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So we might as well all fight!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I... I've decided to join the ARLONG Pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Nami, what're you saying? Are you out of your mind!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Did they do something to you!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Did they do anything horrible to you!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Then they must've threatened you! Right!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That's... the tattoo of the Arlong Pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Look at all this money I got...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: They said they'll buy me anything I like...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: How could I after you joined those pirates! Do you have any idea what they're like!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If living honestly means getting killed like Belliemere...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Then I want no part of it!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How could you say such a thing!? Did you forget that belliemere...

summary: This part deepens Nami’s backstory, showing how family, money, and survival became tied to Arlong’s control over the village.
